tactics: Maintain defensive posture. Reduce HY exposure given credit spread widening (+2.3σ). Increase duration via TLT as rate cut expectations build. Hold gold as inflation hedge. Avoid adding broad equity risk until MMTH recovers above 60%.

sectors.name: Energy
sectors.thesis: Oil supply tightening expected in Q3 2026 as OPEC+ cuts take effect. WTI support above $80. Prefer integrated majors over E&P given margin resilience.

sectors.name: Technology
sectors.thesis: Cautious near-term on growth derating. Prefer cash-generative mega-cap over unprofitable growth. Avoid rate-sensitive small-cap tech.
